disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe mid-back pain that began the instant she coughed hard, sharp and wrapping around the ribs, worse on deep breathing and movement
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing when the pain started?
Can you describe the pain and where it is?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It hit the moment I coughed hard — a sharp, stabbing pain right in the middle of my back that wraps around my ribs, and it's worse every time I breathe in deeply or try to move.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive loss of standing height (about 5 cm) over several years and a gradually more rounded upper back
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in your height or posture over the years?
Has your back shape changed over time?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've lost a fair bit of height over the past few years — about 5 cm — and my upper back has become quite rounded and hunched.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Previous low-impact fracture — broke her wrist about five years ago after simply tripping on a rug
trigger_question_examples: Have you broken any bones before, and how did it happen?
Any previous fractures from minor falls or knocks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — about five years ago I broke my wrist just from tripping on a rug. It didn't take much of a fall at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Takes only calcium supplements; is not on any bone-strengthening medication
trigger_question_examples: What medications or supplements do you take for your bones?
Are you on any tablets or injections to strengthen your bones?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just take calcium supplements. Nobody's ever put me on any special medicine or injection for my bones.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies any leg weakness, numbness or pins-and-needles, and denies any loss of bladder or bowel control or numbness around the saddle area
trigger_question_examples: Any weakness, numbness or tingling in your legs?
Any trouble controlling your bladder or bowels, or numbness between your legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my legs feel normal — no weakness or numbness — and I've had no trouble with my waterworks or bowels.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies fevers, chills, night sweats and unexplained weight loss
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills or night sweats?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or chills, no night sweats, and I haven't lost any weight that I know of.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and cannot manage basic tasks tonight because of the severe pain and immobility
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home who can help you tonight?
How are you managing at home with this pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own and honestly I can't manage anything tonight — I can't even get up properly and there's no one here to help me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is not relieved by her usual over-the-counter painkillers
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain, and did it help?
Are your usual painkillers making any difference?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took my usual over-the-counter painkillers but they've made no difference at all — the pain is still agonizing.
